genre_refs: Art Deco / WPA-era patriotic recruitment poster; Mount Rushmore
description: An AI-generated, digitally illustrated poster in a vintage Art Deco / WPA-poster style. The central image is Mount Rushmore depicting the four carved presidential heads (Washington, Jefferson, Theodore Roosevelt, Lincoln), in a faceted, angular illustration style with a muted palette of teal-blue, slate, tan, and cream. Sunburst rays radiate from behind the mountain across a cloudy sky, and a forest of conifer trees and an Art Deco geometric arch motif sit at the base. A thin double-line border frames the poster. A bold cream slab-serif headline runs across a dark band at the bottom: 'YOUR NATION CALLS'.
